chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-961 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G Sindh. **** Mr. Mir Mazhar Hussain, Advocate, is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Mian Mumtaz Rabbani, counsel for the petitioner, and under his instructions does not press the instant petition by submitting that, for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will avail the alternate remedy available to him under the law. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
